reasoning: The 9.3% decline from your 5-min to 20-min power highlights poor lactate clearance, which we're directly addressing. Since your last ride showed extended rest, we'll start controlled with your power on the Emigration Canyon, preparing for the main climb on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate 6 min at 215W (90% FTP) with 3 min at 245W (104% FTP) on repeat

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
